_schema.description: Prospect Status Tracker - lightweight CRM pipeline tracker

fields.name: Prospect full name
fields.title: Job title
fields.source: Lead source (exa, clay, salesfinity, referral, inbound, manual)
fields.meddic_score: Latest MEDDIC score (0-30) - populated at meeting stage
fields.total_attempts: Total dial attempts across all numbers
fields.last_contact_date: ISO date of last meaningful contact
fields.created_date: ISO date when prospect was added
